author: y4rr
content: Result: landed Conv2d::new_full(in,out,kernel,stride,padding,dilation,groups,bias) + 1-line shim from Conv2d::new. New helpers im2col_dilated/col2im_dilated. Forward gated on groups==1 && dilation==(1,1) for GPU; CPU handles all other cases including grouped+dilated. Backward updated to slice per-group at gradient time. set_weight() helper added for tests. 11 new integration tests + probe-before-fix all pass; ferrotorch-nn 1184 lib tests + ferrotorch-vision 387 lib tests + ferrotorch-core 1278 lib tests all green; clippy -D warnings clean; workspace builds. CHANGELOG updated. Phase 6 (#1003) filed for GPU backend extension.
